headline: 5 deployed contracts catalogued across Ethereum, Binance, and BounceBit mainnet; additional contracts and addresses on Base, Solana to be discovered

findings.text: Block explorer search for 'BounceBit' on Etherscan returned BB token at 0xd459ECeddafcc1d876a3be7290A2E16e801073a3; BounceBit Mainnet (ChainID 6001) uses bbscan.io
No canonical 'deployed contracts' documentation page found; documentation references token addresses (BBTC, BBUSD, BB) but does not enumerate all contract addresses per chain
No audit links recorded in protocol.audit_links; audit report referenced in docs but URL not yet fetched
protocol.github is null; no GitHub repository URL provided for deployment artifact enumeration (Foundry, hardhat-deploy, addresses.json)

Multi-chain enumeration required: Ethereum (partially complete - BB token), Binance (referenced but no addresses surfaced), Base (no addresses surfaced), Solana (V3 integration noted but no contract addresses found), BounceBit Chain (native)
No factory patterns or child contract enumeration method attempted; system appears to use single strategy vaults per currency rather than factory-generated pools

Identified admin/control addresses from Etherscan: LayerZero endpoint (0x1a44076050125825900e736c501f859c50fE728c), delegate (0x83F6C2920b56Ae46CCDFfaCB4761032D099286DF), initial owner (0x681a12a2e496FBe469092D7aD029fF3B8cEFaaFb), blacklist contract (0x373D0C84187B255956039F5da06Cf4Cc33c1602D)
Verified addresses are from Etherscan fetched source code; addresses for Binance, Base, Solana, and BounceBit mainnet require additional block explorer searches

rationale.verdict: Discovery incomplete. Identified 5 core contract addresses across 2 confirmed chains (Ethereum, BounceBit); protocol lacks public deployment documentation and GitHub repo, blocking systematic enumeration of addresses on Base, Binance, Solana. Audit links unpinned. Recommend next run fetch bbscan.io and DEX/explorer pages for remaining chains.

evidence.shows: BounceBit Token (BB) deployed on Ethereum at 0xd459ECeddafcc1d876a3be7290A2E16e801073a3; uses BBOFT implementation with LayerZero cross-chain support; constructor args show owner 0x681a12a2e496FBe469092D7aD029fF3B8cEFaaFb
BBTC (Bitcoin on BounceBit) token address: 0xF5e11df1ebCf78b6b6D26E04FF19cD786a1e81dC on BSC, ETH, and BB chains; cross-chain transfer handled by BTC Bridge
BBTC (BounceBit BTC) proxy at 0xF5e11df1ebCf78b6b6D26E04FF19cD786a1e81dC using EIP-1967 transparent proxy pattern; implementation at 0x8b8d92bb45ec8225558096f99d6d75c2b49d6863
BBUSD (Stablecoins on BounceBit) token address: 0x77776b40C3d75cb07ce54dEA4b2Fd1D07F865222 on BSC, ETH, and BB chains
BBUSD (BounceBit USD) proxy at 0x77776b40C3d75cb07ce54dEA4b2Fd1D07F865222 using EIP-1967 transparent proxy pattern; implementation at 0xbc8570ae1dae11d8b439fa1845753bef2eda6eb1
Wrapped BB Token Address: 0xF4c20e5004C6FDCDdA920bDD491ba8C98a9c5863; BB native token total supply capped at 2,100,000,000; dual-token staking for chain security
BounceBit Mainnet Configuration: ChainID 6001, RPC https://fullnode-mainnet.bouncebitapi.com/, Block Explorer https://bbscan.io, Native symbol BB
Architecture specifies custody at CEFFU (V3), collateral mirroring to OKX for Prime (institutional), Standard Chartered for custody in institutional layer; LayerZero for cross-chain messaging
Custodians: Ceffu, Standard Chartered; Bridges: LayerZero, Orbiter, Owlto, MultiBit, Polyhedra, Meson, Free; Oracles: Bracle, Apro

unknowns: D2: No centralized 'deployed contracts' documentation page at /docs/deployments or /docs/addresses; token addresses scattered across multiple docs pages
D3: Audit report referenced in docs ('Smart Contract Audit Report') but audit_links empty; full report URL and firm not yet identified
D4-offchain: protocol.github is null; cannot enumerate Foundry broadcast/ or hardhat-deploy/ artifacts
D5: Base chain - zero addresses surfaced from block explorers or documentation
D5: Binance Smart Chain - token addresses documented but no other protocol contract addresses found
D5: Solana - V3 integration announced but no on-chain contract addresses catalogued
D5: BounceBit Mainnet (ChainID 6001) - block explorer bbscan.io not directly fetchable; no contract enumeration performed
D6: Factory pattern enumeration not attempted; protocol architecture uses single strategy vaults per asset (BBTC, BBUSD, BBETH, BBNB, BBSOL) rather than factory-deployed pools
D8: LayerZero endpoint and control addresses (owner, delegate, blacklist) identified from Etherscan constructor but require verification of equivalent roles on other chains

protocol_metadata.about: BounceBit is a CeDeFi (centralized finance + decentralized finance) Layer 1 blockchain that enables institutional-grade yield strategies through regulated custody (Ceffu, Standard Chartered) and delta-neutral trading. Users can deposit BTC, ETH, stablecoins, and other assets into strategy vaults (BBTC, BBUSD, BBETH, BBNB, BBSOL), which are represented as rebasing BB-Tokens on the native BounceBit chain and earn yield through funding rate arbitrage, node staking, and ecosystem DeFi opportunities.
